citations.narrative:
There is not an identifiable, readily available attendant during all times of public contact with the animals. There is an
enclosure behind the main pavilion that houses one pig, two zebu, one llama, one camel, one cow, one sheep, and three
goats. At the time of inspection, there is no attendant present while the public is feeding these animals.
Without an attendant present to monitor interactions, both animals and members of the public are at greater risk of injury.
The facility must have a responsible, knowledgeable, and readily identifiable employee or attendant present at all times
during periods of public contact.

citations.desc: Procurement of dogs, cats, and other animals; dealers.
citations.narrative:
The facility acquired one camel on 06/27/2025 and two Asiatic water buffalo on 02/17/2025 from a facility that is not
licensed with the USDA. As a USDA-licensed exhibitor, the licensee is required to obtain animals from licensed persons, if
those persons are required to have a license. The facility supplying these animals to this licensee is required to be
licensed, as they were supplying exotic hoofstock, and do not qualify for exemptions from the licensing requirements.
Purchasing animals from sellers who are required to have a license but do not prevents APHIS from ensuring the well-
being of those animals at their originating facility. No dealer or exhibitor shall knowingly obtain any dog, cat, or other
animal from any person who is required to be licensed but who does not hold a current, valid, and unsuspended license.
To be corrected from this day, April 9, 2026, forward.

The perimeter fence for the two black and white ruffed lemurs is not 6 feet tall. Two different areas measure 66 inches tall
and 70.5 inches tall. There is also a section of runway that the animals have access to that is outside of the perimeter
fence. Additionally, the space used for lemur meet and greet interactions is not enclosed by a perimeter fence. The meet
and greet space was not in use during the inspection.
An insufficient perimeter fence can allow unwanted animals or people to enter the facility and potentially harm the animals
within. The perimeter fence must be constructed so that it protects nonhuman primates by restricting unauthorized
humans, and animals the size of dogs, skunks, and raccoons from going through it or under it and having contact with the
nonhuman primates. It must be of sufficient height (at least six feet high) to keep unwanted species out. It must be of
sufficient distance (at least three feet) from the outside wall or fence of the primary enclosure to prevent physical contact
between animals inside the enclosure and outside the perimeter fence.
To be corrected by June 9, 2026.

citations.desc: Environment enhancement to promote psychological well-being.
citations.narrative:
At the time of inspection, a written environment enhancement plan has not been established to promote the psychological
wellbeing of the black and white ruffed lemurs.
Failure to establish and maintain a plan for environment enhancement can result in the behavioral, social, and
psychological needs of the nonhuman primates not being met. The plan must be at the direction of the attending
veterinarian and address at a minimum social grouping, environmental enrichment, special considerations, restraint
devices, and any nonhuman primates that are exempted by the attending veterinarian because of health issues or other
conditions. The facility must establish and maintain an environment enhancement plan for nonhuman primates.
To be corrected by May 9, 2026.

citations.desc: Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control.
citations.narrative:
There is an accumulation of feces and old food waste in the indoor and outdoor areas of the lemur enclosure which is
attracting a large number of flies.
Inadequate cleaning can increase the risk of disease, create odors, and attract pests. Excreta and food waste must be
removed from inside each indoor primary enclosure daily and from underneath them as often as necessary to prevent an
excessive accumulation of feces and food waste, to prevent the nonhuman primates from becoming soiled, and to reduce
disease hazards, insects, pests, and odors. Dirt floors, floors with absorbent bedding, and planted areas in primary
enclosures must be spot-cleaned with sufficient frequency to ensure all animals the freedom to avoid contact with excreta,
or as often as necessary to reduce disease hazards, insects, pests, and odors.
To be corrected by April 13, 2026.

The perimeter fence for the two kangaroos and the two capybaras is not 6 feet tall, with one section measuring 69.5
inches tall. One juvenile capybara is being housed in an enclosure that does not have a perimeter fence.
An insufficient perimeter fence cannot effectively act as secondary containment for the animals inside and can allow
unwanted animals or people to enter the facility and potentially harm the animals within. The perimeter fence must be
constructed so that it protects the animals in the facility by restricting animals and unauthorized persons from going
through it or under it and having contact with the animals in the facility, and so that it can function as a secondary
containment system for the animals in the facility. It must be of sufficient height (at least six feet high) to keep animals and
unauthorized persons out. It must be of sufficient distance (at least three feet) from the outside of the primary enclosure to
prevent physical contact between animals inside the enclosure and animals or persons outside the perimeter fence.
To be corrected by June 9, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
n

Environment enhancement to promote psychological well-being.

3.84(a) 
   
Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control. 
There is an accumulation of feces and old food waste in the indoor and outdoor areas of the lemur enclosure which is

3.127(d) 
   
Facilities, outdoor. 
The perimeter fence for the two kangaroos and the two capybaras is not 6 feet tall, with one section measuring 69.5
